recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuYmFzZV90YXNrIGltcG9ydCBCYXNlVGFzawoKdGFzayA9IEJhc2VUYXNrKCJQbGFuIiwgIm9wZW4iKQp0YXNrLm1hcmtfZG9uZSgpCnByaW50KHRhc2subGFiZWwoKSkK',
    'models/base_task.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
